2301540.name: Hunting Bigfoot
2301540.description:
After a military transport got struck by Bigfoot You were left as the only survivor. Now it's up to You to hunt down Bigfoot and put an end on the rogue creature.

Equipment

Equipment is the key to your success. Your gear consists of anything from medkits to flares and weapons. Use different weapon types and setup explosives to gain the advantage during an encounter with Bigfoot. Use your trustworthy gps to locate points of interests along with tracking bigfoot.

Maps

Visit multiple locations, and explore beautiful landscapes. Be on the lookout for points of interest to find loot, unlock new objectives and respawn points along with hidden secrets.

Objectives

Your main goal is to hunt down Bigfoot but through all the carnage there is still important tasks to complete alongside the hunt. Side objectives can vary from locating fallen soldiers to collecting samples from the local wildlife for research purpose. New objectives can be found by exploring the map and locating various points of interests.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
